What's going on everyone? Good morning. I want to make this quick video for you so that you see one of the new features that we have. So go to my account and this is related to your team members and their commissions. So you can go to team member. You can add a new member very easily and once you add the member you'll notice here that you can adjust their commissions. The reason that this is really awesome is that if you want to incentivize selling some products over others because the commissions are larger or smaller than you could incentivize your team based on that. So now you have that flexibility and so you know the way that this works is if it were me set a global commission percentage so if you are using the standard that we recommend it would be like 7.5% and then that would be the global commission percentage. Now if you want to specifically incentivize one of them then you can go in and add a percentage for that specific product that would be percentage based or you can do a flat. So the difference is if I said I wanted 10% here then it would be $13.40 that would be 10% and flat means I can just put how much I want to pay someone so if I want to just pay $750 you know whatever let's use a different number so it doesn't get confusing. $8 would be my flat. Obviously you can't do both because I would confuse the system but and you select it and then that's that right. Now the way that the logic works is that global will be the second so anything that's on an individual product will be the primary. So if you set a global setting of 7.5% and then you want three products specifically to be flat commissions of something else because that's the products you want to push that month or that whatever then those three that you are changing will be the three that you change will be the primary that's what the system will recognize as the one that's going to be used. Anything that is not filled out will go to the default of 7.5%. I hope that makes sense. Now if you want to change the way that we have all this set up is that all of these are for the individual products so these are technically all different skews for us. So you have a three pack a six pack a 12 pack a fruit punch a three pack a six pack a 12 pack a pink lemonade and then an individual just a two because this has two products in it. Just the individual bundle with the pink lemonade flavor the individual bundle with the fruit punch flavor. Now most of you guys are most interested in the subscribe and save feature so you can make if you want to give recurring commissions then you can put that recurring commission here either as the percentage again or as the flat commission. So that is what is new. I hope you think that's really cool or as cool as we think it is. Once you're done all you have to do is go to the bottom and click save and then that will be the new commissions for that specific team member so you can even change it between team members if you wanted to which I think is pretty neat right. So if we're going back to our team that's how you create a new member and then you're just the commissions if you already have members that have already been created then you just go to that member click edit and then you go in and then you can edit it accordingly. All right very straightforward very easy hope that makes sense. This member commission here will then obviously show you the commissions for each member and running commission unfortunately we haven't paid anyone out this is the test account but that is how this all works with the new feature. So hope you enjoy and I think your team will be happy that you have this new level of flexibility.
